entities.name: Article
entities.description: Blog article about the horse (Training, Health, Competitions, Gear) with metadata used for filtering, sorting, and navigation.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Full article title shown on list and detail pages.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-safe identifier used to build the article URL.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Full URL or path to this article, used for navigation and 'Copy link' share action.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Main category of the article, matching categoryId in URLs and navigation.

fields.name: tagIds
fields.description: Array of Tag.id values applied to this article (e.g., Jumping, Lameness, Tricks).

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Short excerpt/teaser used on list and search result pages.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Full body HTML/Markdown of the article.

fields.name: published_at
fields.description: Article publish date/time; year component used for archive filters (e.g., 2023, 2024).

fields.name: display_published_date
fields.description: Published date formatted exactly as shown on the page, so it can be copied into contact messages.

fields.name: hero_image_url
fields.description: Main image shown at the top of the article detail page.

fields.name: thumbnail_image_url
fields.description: Smaller image used on article lists and search results.

fields.name: reading_time_minutes
fields.description: Approximate reading time shown in article listings.

fields.name: allow_comments
fields.description: Whether visitors can submit comments on this article.

fields.name: is_featured
fields.description: Whether to highlight this article on the homepage.

entities.name: Tag
entities.description: Label used to group and filter articles (e.g., Jumping, Lameness, Tricks).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the tag (e.g., 'Jumping').

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier used in filters or breadcrumbs.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional explanation of this tag.

entities.name: Comment
entities.description: Visitor comments left on article detail pages.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the Article this comment belongs to.

fields.name: author_name
fields.description: Name entered in the comment form (e.g., 'Guest Rider', 'Trick Voter').

fields.name: author_email
fields.description: Email entered in the comment form.

fields.name: body
fields.description: Comment text; validations enforce minimum word counts for some tasks.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the comment was submitted.

fields.name: is_approved
fields.description: Whether this comment is visible on the site.

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Single-user reading list entries representing articles saved to read later.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the saved Article.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the article was added to the reading list.

entities.name: FavoriteArticle
entities.description: Articles (stories) marked as favorites, shown on the unified Favorites page.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the favorited Article.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: When this article was added to favorites.

entities.name: Photo
entities.description: Gallery photo of the horse, used in the Photo Gallery and Favorites.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Short title or caption for the photo.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Longer description or story behind the photo.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Calendar year when the photo was taken, used for gallery year filters (e.g., 2022).

fields.name: category
fields.description: Gallery category/tab for this photo, including 'competitions' for competition photos.

fields.name: image_url
fields.description: Full-size image URL used in the large viewer.

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: Thumbnail image URL used in the gallery grid and favorites grid.

fields.name: taken_at
fields.description: Exact date/time the photo was taken, if known.

fields.name: location
fields.description: Where the photo was taken (e.g., specific competition venue).

entities.name: FavoritePhoto
entities.description: Photos marked as favorites, used to populate the photo section of the Favorites page and the favorites viewer.

fields.name: photoId
fields.description: ID of the favorited Photo.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: When this photo was added to favorites.

entities.name: Poll
entities.description: Interactive poll shown in article sidebars (e.g., 'Which trick should Star learn next?').

fields.name: question
fields.description: Poll question displayed to visitors.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional additional text or instructions for the poll.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this poll is currently accepting votes.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the poll was created.

fields.name: closes_at
fields.description: Optional closing time after which no more votes are accepted.

entities.name: PollOption
entities.description: Single answer option for a poll (e.g., 'Bow' in the tricks poll).

fields.name: pollId
fields.description: ID of the Poll this option belongs to.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Text displayed to the user (e.g., 'Bow').

fields.name: value
fields.description: Internal identifier for this option (e.g., 'bow').

fields.name: vote_count
fields.description: Total number of votes recorded for this option.

entities.name: PollVote
entities.description: Single-user record of which option was selected for a poll (e.g., voting for 'Bow').

fields.name: pollId
fields.description: Poll that was voted on.

fields.name: optionId
fields.description: PollOption chosen for this vote.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the vote was submitted.

entities.name: NewsletterSubscription
entities.description: Subscription details for the blog newsletter, including selected topics, frequency, and format.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Subscriber name entered in the newsletter form (e.g., 'Horse Fan').

fields.name: email
fields.description: Subscriber email address.

fields.name: wants_training_tips
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for the 'Training tips' topic.

fields.name: wants_competition_updates
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for the 'Competition updates' topic.

fields.name: wants_merchandise_offers
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for a topic like 'Merchandise offers'.

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: How often emails are sent; tasks specifically choose 'weekly'.

fields.name: email_format
fields.description: Preferred email format; tasks select 'html' instead of 'plain_text'.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the subscription was created.

entities.name: ContactMessage
entities.description: Messages submitted via the Contact form, including nutrition questions referencing specific articles and dates.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name entered in the contact form (e.g., 'Alex Rider').

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email entered in the contact form.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Subject line for the message (e.g., 'Question about oats feeding schedule').

fields.name: message
fields.description: Full body of the message; may include the word 'oats' and an article's published date string.

fields.name: inquiry_type
fields.description: Dropdown selection categorizing the inquiry; tasks use 'nutrition_advice'.

fields.name: relatedArticleId
fields.description: Optional ID of the Article this message refers to (e.g., oats feeding article).

fields.name: related_article_published_date_text
fields.description: Published date of the related article copied exactly as shown, if the user included it.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the contact form was submitted.
